title: Frontier AI has broken the open CTF format
summary: Frontier AI models now solve open CTF challenges too easily, breaking the traditional format. Developers should redesign CTF competitions to remain effective for skill-building and benchmarking.

title: The main thing about P2P meth is that there's so much of it (2021)
summary: This article about P2P methamphetamine production/supply is not tech/AI-related despite appearing on HackerNews. It's a drug policy piece with no relevance to developers or actionable technical insights.

title: The Sonic Revolution: Advanced Speech Tech and AI
summary: Advanced speech tech and AI are converging to transform voice interfaces. Developers should explore speech APIs for next-gen apps. Act now: prototype voice features.
